debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
identDistrib_neg_X : ∀ (i : ι), IdentDistrib (X i) (-X i) μ μ
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
this : DecidableEq ι
I : Fin m → ι × ι
hI : I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A
⊢ Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ

      rw [ENNReal.mul_inv_cancel]
      · simp only [Nat.cast_eq_zero, Nat.succ_ne_zero, not_false_iff]
      · exact ENNReal.coe_ne_top

cases m with
    | zero => simp
    | succ m =>
      simp only [mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI
      refine MemLp.integrable ?_
      refine MemLp.finset_prod univ _ (fun _ => m + 1) ?_ ?_
      · simp only [sum_const, card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul, Nat.cast_succ]
        rw [ENNReal.inv_one, mul_inv_cancel] <;> simp
      · intro k _
        refine MemLp.mul ?_ ?_
        · apply (memLp_X _ (hI k).1).norm
        · apply (memLp_X _ (hI k).2).norm

rcases m.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hm
    · simp
    apply MemLp.integrable
    rw [← ENNReal.inv_one]
    refine MemLp.finset_prod Finset.univ (fun _ _ ↦ m) ?_ ?_
    · simp only [Finset.card_univ, Fintype.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_inv,
        ENNReal.inv_mul_cancel (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 hm.ne') ENNReal.natCast_ne_top]
    · intro k _
      have hk := mem_prod.1 (mem_piFinset.1 hI k)
      refine MemLp.mul ((memLp_X _ hk.1).norm) ((memLp_X _ hk.2).norm) ?_
      rw [show (1 : ℝ≥0∞) / (2 * m) + 1 / (2 * m) = 1 / m by
        simp only [Nat.cast_mul, ENNReal.mul_inv, Nat.cast_ofNat]
        rw [← two_mul, ← mul_assoc, ENNReal.mul_inv_cancel two_ne_zero ENNReal.two_ne_top, one_mul]]
